law: Three contract SKUs on www — dimensions route buyers; no fourth contract card on homepage

outcome_sku.name: Machine Rule Pack
outcome_sku.buyer_summary: Encode approved cleanup as evaluate rules, TLE receipts, and fail-closed export — auditors can re-run checks

dimensions.name: Language Clarity Scan
dimensions.buyer_summary: Find unclear policy language, vague automation labels, and buyer-facing wording that auditors will challenge

dimensions.name: Decision Conflict Review
dimensions.buyer_summary: Surface conflicting approvals, duplicate CTAs, and go/no-go paths that disagree across hubs and intake

dimensions.name: Authority Claim Audit
dimensions.buyer_summary: Remove fake authority — certification, license, and partner claims without receipts or honest scope badges

dimensions.name: Automation Safety Wording
dimensions.buyer_summary: Replace unsafe automation promises with blocked/allowed/receipted execution language tied to evaluate

dimensions.name: Public-Risk Claim Scrub
dimensions.buyer_summary: Scrub public-risk claims that cannot be verified — pricing drift, fake proof counters, draft copy on money pages
